summary: The reproduction bundle clones the upstream repository at the pinned vulnerable v3.4.1 commit and verifies that a one-line malformed flatted payload crashes the Go unflatten path with an out-of-range panic.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should cause the Go parser to panic with `index out of range [1] with length 1` while processing the malformed flatted payload `[["1"]]`.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned the upstream repository at commit `2a02dce7c641dec31194c67663f9b0b12e62da20`, built the Go verifier image, and triggered a deterministic panic: `panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1`. The stack trace included `/target-repo/golang/pkg/flatted/flatted.go:230`, and the verifier then printed `[evohunt] verified: malformed flatted index causes Go parser panic`.
verification_method: The containerized verifier runs the pinned Go CLI against the malicious payload, requires a non-zero exit, and matches the panic text and `golang/pkg/flatted/flatted.go:230` stack-frame signal to distinguish the bug from an unrelated build or runtime failure.
evidence_produced_by_run: panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1
[evohunt] verified: malformed flatted index causes Go parser panic

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and mounts that checkout into the container at /target-repo.
